rows.desc: XML declaration — should be first line of every XML document
Standalone declaration — yes means no external DTD required

CDATA section — content treated as raw character data, not markup

Elements must be properly nested: — never overlap
All attribute values must be enclosed in single or double quotes

Every opening tag must have a matching closing tag

Groups elements by category; used with XSLT/CSS styling

— element with no content
